content: اِلمُسلِمين لاَزِم يِطَلَّعوا زَكَاة إتنين وَ نُصّ في اِلمِييَة
translations: eng:muslims must give two and a half percent poor tax

transcriptions.arabizi: ilmuslimeen laezim yitallaAw zakaet 'itneen wa nussafiilmiyya
